case_title: NEAL STRICKBERGER VS. VALDEZ PAINTING, INC.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-13-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-13-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF NEAL STRICKBERGER.
